zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome於1444年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安海利斯時，他的父親Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes33歲，母親Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy30歲。他於1472年與Janet Napier在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1517年9月17日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome于1444年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安海利斯时，他的父亲Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes33岁，母亲Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy30岁。他于1472年与Janet Napier在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1517年9月17日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Whitsome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English:  see  Witham  , probably from the place in Lincs so named.

variants.name: Witham
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, particularly those in Essex, Lincolnshire, and Somerset, though most often from Essex. The Essex placename may derive from Old English wiht ‘curve, bend’ + hām ‘village, homestead’. North and South Witham in Lincolnshire take their names from the river Witham (of uncertain origin). Witham on the Hill (Lincolnshire) may derive from the Old English personal name Wit(t)a, Old English wita ‘councillor’, or wiht ‘curve, bend’ + hām. The Somerset placename derives from the Old English personal name Wit(t)a or Old English wita + hām.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome was born in 1444, in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes, was 33 and his mother, Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy, was 30. He married Janet Napier in 1472, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 September 1517, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome est né en 1444, à Hailes, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Janet Napier en 1472, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1517, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome 1444 in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes 33 und seine Mutter Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy 30. Er hat 1472 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Janet Napier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. September 1517 im Alter von 73 Jahren in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome è nato il nel 1444 nel Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Janet Napier nel 1472, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1517, nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsomeが1444年にスコットランドミドロスアンヘイレスで生まれた時，父Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailesは33歳，母Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothyは30歳であった。1472年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでJanet Napierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1517年9月17日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome(이)가 1444년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 하일레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1472년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Janet Napier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1517년 9월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome nasceu em 1444, em Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Napier em 1472, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1517, em East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome родился в 1444 г. в местности хеилесь, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Napier в 1472 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 сентября 1517 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Hepburn of  Whitsome nació en 1444, en Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Janet Napier en 1472, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1517, en East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
